title: SQLancer calc.abs undefined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id Int32 PRIMARY KEY, value String NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, value) VALUES (1, '100'), (2, '200'), (3, NULL), (4, 'abc');
CREATE TABLE t2 (num Float64, text String);
SELECT CAST(VAR_SAMP(abs(toInt32(value))) AS Int32) FROM t1 GROUP BY toInt32(value), value;
key_bug_features: Using abs() on a VARCHAR column
